pi_items.source: Contradicted the 'open-source psychometrics project data' claim by verifying the data is dynamically generated entirely from scratch by a python script in `setup_task.sh`.

privileged_info_summary: The dataset is entirely synthetically generated by a Python script using a 1-parameter logistic (Rasch) IRT model, contradicting the claim that it originates from an open-source psychometrics project. It contains exactly 105 participants and 30 items. Participant P099 is explicitly coded to exhibit random responder speeding behavior and must be excluded. Item 14 is intentionally miskeyed by inverting its correctness score. The randomly seeded ground truth generation confirms Cronbach's alpha is ~0.812 and identifies item 14 with a negative corrected item-total correlation (CITC) of -0.26. The task expects the final report to be written to '/home/ga/pebl/analysis/item_analysis_report.json'.
